TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_sowing_Paicu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: teku poi sua kumakʉrai miana vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: teku poi sua kumakɨr~ɾai miana vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: teku poi sua kumakʉrai miana vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: teku poi sua kumakɨr~ɾai miana vinaʔɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 我要說關於以前種植小米(的事情).

S.TRANSL: 我要說關於以前種植小米 .
I am going to talk about the millet growing in the past.
首先我們去那裏砍.
At first, we went there to hoe.
看著我要種植小米的地方.
watch the place where I will grow the millet.
完成砍伐了,我就回到家裡.
I went to hoe and then went home.

S.FORM: po'icikia tanasa nuren maka'ʉnacikia mokusa 'inia numanamarʉ.
S.PHON: poʔiʦikia tanasa nur~ɾen makaʔɨnaʦikia mokusa ʔinia numanamar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: po'icikia tanasa nuren maka'ʉnacikia mokusa 'inia numanamarʉ.
S.PHON: poʔiʦikia tanasa nur~ɾen makaʔɨnaʦikia mokusa ʔinia numanamar~ɾɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 我回家,隔天我再次去那裏燒(雜草).

S.TRANSL: 我回家,隔天我再次去那裏燒 .
I went home. And I went there to burn them the next day.
就要燒芒草了.
We were going to burn miscanthus.
就那樣,燒著芒草.
like that, burned the miscanthus.
耕地要整理除草.
The field would be weeded.
再整理除草.
the weeding will be done again.

S.FORM: tecu tia tecu mavici kakaamarʉ tuku tapi tanʉkʉ vina'ʉ mataa canumu.
S.PHON: teʦu tia teʦu maviʦi kakaamar~ɾɨ tuku tapi tanɨkɨ vinaʔɨ mataa ʦanumu.
S.FORM: tecu tia tecu mavici kakaamarʉ tuku tapi tanʉkʉ vina'ʉ mataa canumu.
S.PHON: teʦu tia teʦu maviʦi kakaamar~ɾɨ tuku tapi tanɨkɨ vinaʔɨ mataa ʦanumu.
S.TRANSL: 就要帶著鐮刀.小鋤頭.背簍.芋頭.小米,和水.
I would bring sickle, pickax, basket, taro, millet, and water.
就那樣.
like that.
我要去那裏.
I would go there to plant.
去種.
to rake.
我要去那裏, 去那裏種.
I would go there, go there to plant.
我種小米.
I grew the millet.
到了中午我就休息.
I rested at noon.

S.FORM: tecu kumakʉʉn kumakʉʉnkia tanʉkʉ mima canumu.
S.PHON: teʦu kumakɨɨn kumakɨɨnkia tanɨkɨ mima ʦanumu.
S.FORM: tecu kumakʉʉn kumakʉʉnkia tanʉkʉ mima canumu.
S.PHON: teʦu kumakɨɨn kumakɨɨnkia tanɨkɨ mima ʦanumu.
S.TRANSL: 我們要用餐了,我們吃芋頭,喝水.
we would eat, we ate taro and drink water.
喝 水就回家了.
After drinking water, we went home.

S.FORM: po'ici tanasa mosacikia tanaha pookari tecu mosa 'inia kavangvang cau.
S.PHON: poʔiʦi tanasa mosaʦikia tanaha pookar~ɾi teʦu mosa ʔinia kavaŋvaŋ ʦau.
S.FORM: po'ici tanasa mosacikia tanaha pookari tecu mosa 'inia kavangvang cau.
S.PHON: poʔiʦi tanasa mosaʦikia tanaha pookar~ɾi teʦu mosa ʔinia kavaŋvaŋ ʦau.
S.TRANSL: 回到了家裡,我就去那裡呼喚所有的人.
I went back to home, I went home to call and all people went there.

S.FORM: tecu tumatakʉtakʉ tecu itumuru tecu itumuru takʉtakaa.
S.PHON: teʦu tumatakɨtakɨ teʦu itumur~ɾu teʦu itumur~ɾu takɨtakaa.
S.FORM: tecu tumatakʉtakʉ tecu itumuru tecu itumuru takʉtakaa.
S.PHON: teʦu tumatakɨtakɨ teʦu itumur~ɾu teʦu itumur~ɾu takɨtakaa.
S.TRANSL: 要砍伐了,要很多了,要砍伐的地方很多.
We were going to hoe; there were a lot, there were a lot of places to hoe.
人們砍伐,完成之後,回家了.
people hoed, and they went home after finishing it.

S.PHON: nur~ɾen mosa ʔinia mosa ʔinia teʦu numanamar~ɾɨ.
nur~ɾen mosa ʔinia mosa ʔinia teʦu numanamar~ɾɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 隔天就要去那裏燒(雜草).

S.TRANSL: 隔天就要去那裏燒 .

TRANSL.notes: We went there to burn (the weed) the next day.

S.TRANSL: We went there to burn the next day.
燒了,燒完之後,就要鋤草了.
we burned. After burning, we would weed.

TRANSL.notes: 人們除草我也除草,(完成之後)就回家了.

S.TRANSL: 人們除草我也除草, 就回家了.
People weed, and so did I. Then we went home.
完成除草了.
We finished weeding.

S.FORM: po'ici tanasa po'ici 'inia sua cau tecu kumakarai kumaria vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: poʔiʦi tanasa poʔiʦi ʔinia sua ʦau teʦu kumakar~ɾai kumar~ɾia vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: po'ici tanasa po'ici 'inia sua cau tecu kumakarai kumaria vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: poʔiʦi tanasa poʔiʦi ʔinia sua ʦau teʦu kumakar~ɾai kumar~ɾia vinaʔɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 回家之後…人們(親族)回去(耕地)那裏,耙梳,繼續種植小米.

S.TRANSL: 回家之後…人們 回去 那裏,耙梳,繼續種植小米.
After we went home…People went back there, and they would keep planting the millet.

S.FORM: makasuacu kumakarai kavang taa tevapa kumakarai ʉncoo karianasanasau kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu kumakar~ɾai kavaŋ taa tevapa kumakar~ɾai ɨnʦoo kar~ɾianasanasau kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: makasuacu kumakarai kavang taa tevapa kumakarai ʉncoo karianasanasau kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu kumakar~ɾai kavaŋ taa tevapa kumakar~ɾai ɨnʦoo kar~ɾianasanasau kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣,大家一起耙梳,阿!還要,耙梳之外.進行那個所謂的karianasanasau的儀式動作.
Like that, all people raked. More! We did that so-called sowing rival.

S.FORM: karianasanasau kisʉʉn ia kumakaraikia kamanʉngkia tingingai kumarai.
S.PHON: kar~ɾianasanasau kisɨɨn ia kumakar~ɾaikia kamanɨŋkia tiŋiŋai kumar~ɾai.
S.FORM: karianasanasau kisʉʉn ia kumakaraikia kamanʉngkia tingingai kumarai.
S.PHON: kar~ɾianasanasau kisɨɨn ia kumakar~ɾaikia kamanɨŋkia tiŋiŋai kumar~ɾai.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的karianasanasau,我們另外做在小小的耕地上.
the so called sowing rival, I raked, I did it on another small field.
我們就在那裡吃,吃午餐.
We were eating there, eating lunch.

S.FORM: kumakʉʉnkia nipo'ocipa tanʉkʉ mima pava'atʉ mima.
S.PHON: kumakɨɨnkia nipoʔoʦipa tanɨkɨ mima pavaʔatɨ mima.
S.FORM: kumakʉʉnkia nipo'ocipa tanʉkʉ mima pava'atʉ mima.
S.PHON: kumakɨɨnkia nipoʔoʦipa tanɨkɨ mima pavaʔatɨ mima.
S.TRANSL: 我們吃所煮的芋頭,喝...配著喝水.
we ate the taro that we cooked, drink… and accompanied with water.

TRANSL.notes: 就那樣,完成了,我(們)就去拿芒草.

S.TRANSL: 就那樣,完成了,我 就去拿芒草.
Like that, we finished; then we went take the miscanthus.

S.FORM: maracikia capuku mata'ariusu matacʉkʉcikʉ capuku na namuriungiin.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaʦikia ʦapuku mataʔar~ɾiusu mataʦɨkɨʦikɨ ʦapuku na namur~ɾiuŋiin.
S.FORM: maracikia capuku mata'ariusu matacʉkʉcikʉ capuku na namuriungiin.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaʦikia ʦapuku mataʔar~ɾiusu mataʦɨkɨʦikɨ ʦapuku na namur~ɾiuŋiin.

TRANSL.notes: 我就拿了芒草,(葉子)交叉(打結),芒草插在(地上)周邊.

S.TRANSL: 我就拿了芒草, 交叉 ,芒草插在 周邊.
I took miscanthuses, crossing and inserting them around the place.

S.FORM: mata'ariusu mocacikia aruncu tapi mataa tuku mocacikia tanasa.
S.PHON: mataʔar~ɾiusu moʦaʦikia ar~ɾunʦu tapi mataa tuku moʦaʦikia tanasa.
S.FORM: mata'ariusu mocacikia aruncu tapi mataa tuku mocacikia tanasa.
S.PHON: mataʔar~ɾiusu moʦaʦikia ar~ɾunʦu tapi mataa tuku moʦaʦikia tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 我就拿著背簍和小鋤頭,走去家裡.
I walked to take the pickax.

S.FORM: mitana'uru mitana'urucikia mitana'urucikia tekia pokariikari makasi.
S.PHON: mitanaʔur~ɾu mitanaʔur~ɾuʦikia mitanaʔur~ɾuʦikia tekia pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi makasi.
S.FORM: mitana'uru mitana'urucikia mitana'urucikia tekia pokariikari makasi.
S.PHON: mitanaʔur~ɾu mitanaʔur~ɾuʦikia mitanaʔur~ɾuʦikia tekia pokar~ɾiikar~ɾi makasi.

TRANSL.notes: 盪鞦韆, 我(們)盪鞦韆, 我(們)盪鞦韆,我(們)要這麼說.

S.TRANSL: 盪鞦韆, 我 盪鞦韆, 我 盪鞦韆,我 要這麼說.
Swing, I swing, I said this.

S.FORM: cinvurakasu vina'umaku makai caapuku nivoru vina'uku maaningcau.
S.PHON: ʦinvur~ɾakasu vinaʔumaku makai ʦaapuku nivor~ɾu vinaʔuku maaniŋʦau.
S.FORM: cinvurakasu vina'umaku makai caapuku nivoru vina'uku maaningcau.
S.PHON: ʦinvur~ɾakasu vinaʔumaku makai ʦaapuku nivor~ɾu vinaʔuku maaniŋʦau.
S.TRANSL: 長大吧,我的小米, 我的小米要像nivoru 那個芒草那麼漂亮.
Grow up, my millet. Be as beautiful as thnivoru.
說著「大大的高高的」.
say: be big and tall.
我盪鞦韆, 我盪鞦韆,就那樣.
I swing like that.

S.FORM: makahiakasu capuku sua vina'ʉ mitana'uru mitatitiin macacasʉ maaningcau cʉ'ʉrʉʉn misee.
S.PHON: makahiakasu ʦapuku sua vinaʔɨ mitanaʔur~ɾu mitatitiin maʦaʦasɨ maaniŋʦau ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨn misee.
S.FORM: makahiakasu capuku sua vina'ʉ mitana'uru mitatitiin macacasʉ maaningcau cʉ'ʉrʉʉn misee.
S.PHON: makahiakasu ʦapuku sua vinaʔɨ mitanaʔur~ɾu mitatitiin maʦaʦasɨ maaniŋʦau ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨn misee.
S.TRANSL: 說著: 你要如此,小米要像芒草,盪著吊著長長的,看起來漂漂亮亮.
say: Be like this. Millet should be like those long miscanthuses, swing, hanging, and looking beautiful.
就那些.
just these.
所有的人都要去那裏.
All people went there.

S.FORM: tecu mosa 'inia kangvang cau kumakarai kumakarai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: teʦu mosa ʔinia kaŋvaŋ ʦau kumakar~ɾai kumakar~ɾai vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: tecu mosa 'inia kangvang cau kumakarai kumakarai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: teʦu mosa ʔinia kaŋvaŋ ʦau kumakar~ɾai kumakar~ɾai vinaʔɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 所有的人都要去那裏耙梳(鬆土),耙梳小米.

S.TRANSL: 所有的人都要去那裏耙梳 ,耙梳小米.
All people went there to rake the field to plant the millet.
人們完成耙梳.
People finished the raking work.
我就走去家裡了.
Then I walked home.
結束.
finished.
結束.
finished.
